name: publish-research
description: Publish a local research folder to your own GitHub Pages site.

publish_repo.title: Name of the repo that will host your published research
publish_repo.description: A repo under your GitHub account. Created automatically on first publish if it doesn't exist.

display_name.title: Display name shown on the landing page
display_name.description: Falls back to your GitHub real name (then username) if omitted.
